name: minimal
description: Reduzierter, klarer Stil mit viel Weißraum
style_instructions: Style: Ultra-minimalist, Scandinavian-inspired design. Color palette: White, light gray, single accent color, monochromatic. Composition: Maximum white space, single focal element, perfect alignment. Lighting: Soft, shadowless, flat lighting. Rendering: Simple geometric shapes, clean lines, no texture or noise. Typography area: Expansive clean areas for text. Mood: Calm, refined, essential.
